title: Selector
description: Identifies a UI node in the Android accessibility tree. Resolution priority (highest → lowest): element_ref → view_id → content_desc → text → class_name+index_in_parent → bounds. Raw bounds are a last resort and require policy.allow_coordinates_fallback = true.

element_ref.description: Opaque ref string assigned by AccessibilityService for this render pass. Highest priority — use when available.

view_id.description: Android resource ID, e.g. 'com.whatsapp:id/send_button'. Stable across app versions when present.

text.description: Visible text content of the node. May be localised — prefer view_id or content_desc.

class_name.description: Full Android class name, e.g. 'android.widget.EditText'. Use together with index_in_parent when no stable id exists.

index_in_parent.description: Zero-based index within the parent node. Only meaningful when used together with class_name.

bounds.description: Absolute screen coordinates. Last resort — requires policy.allow_coordinates_fallback = true.
